title: Update module github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers to v0.9.6

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>docker/docker-credential-helpers (github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers)</summary>

### [`v0.9.6`](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers/releases/tag/v0.9.6)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers/compare/v0.9.5...v0.9.6)

#### What's Changed

- update to go1.25.9
- secretservice: allow building on openbsd
- wincred: minor cleanups
- Dockerfile: document build-args
- Dockerfile: update golangci-lint to v2.11
- Dockerfile: update xx to v1.9.0
- ci: set default permissions and timeouts
- ci: update actions
- ci: pin actions by sha
- ci: add zizmor workflow

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers/compare/v0.9.5...v0.9.6>

</details>
